title: Onboarding - Welcome to Poly Studio - Fresh install
scenario: "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen appears during first-launch onboarding and tapping "Get Started" returns user to the Organized screen
steps: 1. Fresh install the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Observe the onboarding flow that appears.
4. Verify that the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen is displayed.
5. Tap the "Get Started" button on the welcome screen.
6. Observe the screen that appears after tapping "Get Started".
expected: The "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen appears during onboarding after launching the app for the first time. Tapping "Get Started" closes the welcome screen and returns the user to the "Organized" screen to continue the onboarding flow.
